message:
fix: AMP->Codex conversion now emits valid session_meta and correct content types

Closes #10. Two bugs:

1. session_meta payload was missing timestamp field — Codex CLI expects
   payload.timestamp to be present. Added it alongside the top-level timestamp.

2. Assistant response content blocks were emitted as "input_text" but Codex
   expects "output_text" for assistant-generated content. Now uses role-aware
   type selection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
